citations.quote: Rent: £4,686.18 Total Rent (including £500 Advance Rent Payment) £28.23 Per Day
The Landlord acknowledges the Tenant has paid the Advance Payment of FIVE HUNDRED POUNDS (£500) STERLING which will be credited to the Tenant's rent account.

the subsequent Rent payments must be paid by monthly instalments by recurring card payments. The subsequent monthly sums due will be shown on the rent schedule to be provided separately to the Tenant.
The tenant will pay the Rent instalments on the due dates as advised by the Accommodation Office.
If the Tenant's Rent instalments account falls into arrears, the Landlord will be entitled to seek payment from the Tenant's guarantor
Where a Rent account is in arrears by two monthly instalments, the Landlord will be entitled to issue a notice to quit

findings.text: Total rent under the tenancy is £4,686.18, including a £500 advance rent payment, at £28.23 per day.
The landlord acknowledges receipt of a £500 advance rent payment credited to the tenant's rent account.
The tenancy agreement states monthly instalments and due dates will be shown on a separate rent schedule provided to the tenant.
The tenant must pay rent instalments on due dates advised by the Accommodation Office.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Rent Schedule and Payment Records Search Result

### Source Reviewed: NAP-SRC-0010 (Student Licence)

**Findings:**
- Total rent: £4,686.18 (including £500 advance payment).
- £500 advance payment acknowledged as credited to rent account.
- Monthly instalments and due dates to be provided on a separate rent schedule (not included in this source).
- No payment records, ledgers, or receipts found in this source.
- No guarantor details found.

**Gaps:**
- The rent schedule referenced in clause 2(a) is missing.
- No payment history or arrears ledger is available.
- Guarantor information is absent.

**Recommendation:** Search other matter sources (e.g., correspondence, finance records, guarantor forms) for the rent schedule and payment records.
proposed_artifacts.title: Rent Schedule and Payment Records Search Result

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search all remaining matter sources (e.g., correspondence, finance records, guarantor forms, accommodation office communications) for the rent schedule referenced in clause 2(a) of NAP-SRC-0010, any payment records, ledgers, receipts, or guarantor details. Report any documents found and their relevance to the arrears claim.
proposed_tasks.title: Search for rent schedule and payment records in remaining matter sources

risk_flags.text: If arrears exist, the landlord may seek payment from the tenant's guarantor; the guarantor's identity and agreement are not in evidence.
Arrears of two monthly instalments may trigger a notice to quit with 28 days' notice; no such notice is in evidence.
Without the rent schedule or payment records, the precise amount of any alleged arrears cannot be verified.

summary: Reviewed source NAP-SRC-0010 (Student Licence) for rent schedule and payment records. The tenancy agreement states a total rent of £4,686.18, a £500 advance payment credited to the rent account, and that monthly instalments and due dates will be shown on a separate rent schedule. No rent schedule, payment ledger, or payment records were found within the source. The separate rent schedule referenced in clause 2(a) is absent from the provided materials. A follow-up task is proposed to search for the rent schedule and payment records in other matter sources.

uncertainties.text: The rent schedule referenced in clause 2(a) is not present in source NAP-SRC-0010 or any provided artifact.
No payment records, ledgers, or receipts showing actual payments made by the tenant are available in the provided materials.
The identity and contact details of any guarantor for the tenant are not provided in the available sources.
